truthAudit.Summary: Truth audit of Run 2 findings against true vulnerabilities. Found 6 vulnerabilities partially or fully identified, 14 missed. One false positive admission. Three severity corrections needed.

Items.Notes: The previous answer identified a format string vulnerability in log_debug_message, but severity was High instead of Critical.
The previous answer did not identify integer overflow in factorial computation.
The previous answer did not identify use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup.
